title: Minecraft Chaos Edition
description: Minecraft but every few seconds a random event happens!
body:
_Minecraft Chaos Edition_ adds random events that occur every few seconds, inspired by mods like **Gta V Chaos Edition** or **Super Mario 64 Chaos Edition**\
this is my first mod so don't expect anything good from it! Feedback is appreciated and ideas of what events to add!\
**Use /StartTheChaos to enable the mod in-game, without this, it'll just be a regular world** \

/UnfairMode activates the Unfair Events

In-Game Events:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**"I'm Hungry"** Gives the player Hunger 3 for 180 Ticks (9 seconds) \
**"Creeper, Aw Man!"** Spawns a creeper \
**"Who needs eyes anyways"** Gives the player Blindness for 120 ticks (6 seconds) \
**"Up we go!"** Gives the player Levitation for 120 ticks (6 seconds) \
**"Handicap mode"** makes the player unable to move for 120 ticks (6 seconds) \
**"Spooky Scary Skeletons!"** summons two skeletons with iron helmets \
**"Zeus"** Lightning \
**"Where are you looking at?"** Makes the player look in a random direction \
**"Hands off!"** removes the items in your main and off hand \
**"It hurts!"** Deals 8 damage (4 hearts) \
**"Gotta go fast!"** Gives nearby entities speed 3 for 10 seconds

</details>

Unfair Events:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**"Watch Out!"** Explodes a tnt with power of 4\
**"You're not gonna use that"** Deletes your inventory

</details>
